name: Elica S.p.A.
summary: Elica S.p.A. designs, manufactures, and sells motors for cooker hoods and central heating boilers in Europe and CIS countries, America, and internationally. The company offers wall mounted, built-in, island, corner, ceiling, and downdraft hoods. It designs, manufactures, and sells electric motors, hoods for domestic use, and boilers. In addition, the company produces and sells various range of hoods, gas hobs, kitchenware sterilizers, and kitchen home appliances. It offers its products under the Elica, Turboair, Jetair, Ariafina, Arietta, Puti, and FIME brand names. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Fabriano, Italy. Elica S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Fan S.A.
